MEN'S CLUB

The Program

GET BACK IN SHAPE — AND LOOK AFTER YOUR NEXT 10–15 YEARS.

We help busy men who haven't trained in a long time get back in shape — and start looking after their long-term health.

You've got a demanding job, zero energy left, no routine — and your body's starting to let you know about it. Men's Club is where blokes over 30 rebuild their fitness, confidence, and strength with proper coaching, real accountability, and a solid crew around them. No egos. No BS. Just results.

Sessions
3 / WEEK
Pick any times that suit
Session Length
45 MIN
Men-only, coach-led
Membership
CAPPED
250 members max

WHO GET IT.

The Three Pillars

HOW MEN'S CLUB WORKS.

Three pillars that make the difference between another failed attempt and a genuine transformation.

Personal Coaching

One-on-one guidance tailored to your body, your goals, and your lifestyle. No cookie-cutter plans — just a coach who gives a damn.

Accountability

We keep you honest. Weekly check-ins, progress tracking, and a coach in your corner making sure you never fall off the wagon.

Community & Brotherhood

Train alongside blokes who get it. The camaraderie, the banter, the brotherhood — this is what keeps you coming back.

The Difference

WHY MEN'S CLUB WINS.

Due to Insane Demand

OUR MEN'S CLUB PROGRAM IS EXPANDING IN LAWNTON

Do You Qualify?

✓You're a man over 30
✓You suck your belly in when you look in the mirror
✓You're fed up of wearing trousers that don't fit
✓You've got a demanding job
✓You're too busy to train and can't get a routine
✓You're sick of being tired all the time
✓You get out of breath easily playing with the kids
✓You're prepared to eat healthy
✓You're not already in great shape
How It Works

THREE STEPS TO YOUR FIRST SESSION.

01

Get Started

Get in touch in 15 seconds. We sit down, learn your goals and history, and map out what's actually realistic for your life — no pressure, no hard sell.

02

Train With The Crew

Pick any 3 men's-only 45-minute sessions a week. Coach-led, small groups of like-minded blokes. Get strong, drop fat, have a laugh, leave better than you walked in.

03

Get Real Results

A weekly 1-on-1 check-in with your coach keeps you honest. Belt sizes drop. Strength climbs. Energy comes back.

What's Included

EVERYTHING YOU NEED TO ACTUALLY CHANGE.

✓3 men's-only 45-minute sessions per week
✓Personal Trainer leading every session
✓Flexible timetable — train around work and family
✓Recovery & lifestyle coaching (sleep, stress, mobility)
✓Weekly 1-on-1 check-in with your coach
✓Body composition tracking
✓Private members' chat — coach reachable any time
✓Capped at 250 members so you're never just a number

Limited Spots · Lawnton Expansion

READY TO TRAIN WITH THE CREW?

Apply for Men's Club

No pressure, no contracts — just a chat about where you're at.

What You Won't Find Here

WE DON'T ACCEPT ANY OF THIS

Most blokes don't quit because training's too hard. They quit because the room makes them feel small. That doesn't happen here.

No Judgments No Egos No Mirrors No Intimidation No Bullshit
FAQs

COMMON QUESTIONS.

01I haven't trained in years — am I too out of shape for this?

No. Men's Club is literally built for blokes who haven't trained in a long time. Every session is scaled by the coach on the spot. Most members started exactly where you are.

02How many sessions a week, and how long?

You get to pick any 3 sessions per week. Each one is 45 minutes — short enough to fit a busy schedule, long enough to actually move the needle.

03Are the sessions men only?

Yes. Every Men's Club session is blokes only. No mirrors, no posing, no intimidation — just men working hard and having a laugh.

04Do you provide nutrition or meal plans?

No — we don't do nutrition coaching, meal plans, or banned-food lists. We focus on what we do best: coach-led training and accountability. If you want nutrition support, we're happy to point you to a qualified dietitian.

05What's the catch with the 250 members cap?

We deliberately keep Men's Club capped at 250 members across our studios so coaching quality stays high. Most members renew month after month, so spots open up rarely.

06How do I get started?

Get in touch (takes 15 seconds). We sit down, walk you through how it works, and you decide if it's the right fit. No pressure, no hard sell.

GET IN CONTACT

Ready to start your transformation? Fill out the form below and a coach will be in touch — no pressure, no contracts.

No pressure · No contracts · A coach will be in touch within 1 business day.
